scientificPurpose: localize the drag-aligned c16/c20 load residual that peaks at follower phase 0.055 without recomputing unchanged isolated controls

fieldCapture.observationRule: capture is GPU-resident and does not modify populations, geometry, loads, or gate thresholds

coupledOnlyReplayRule.allowedOptimization: rerun the coupled two-owner case only; do not recompute isolated leader or follower controls
coupledOnlyReplayRule.referenceContract: the exact configuration, grid, cycle length, passed status, and 100-bin coupled history are loaded from the locked complete report
coupledOnlyReplayRule.referenceDifferenceDefinition: maximum of relative RMS differences for leader summary, follower summary, and the complete 100-bin coupled power, lift, drag, and force history
coupledOnlyReplayRule.failureAction: reject every captured field if reference reproduction or any unchanged solver gate fails

spatialAnalysis.commonCoordinates: x/chord and z/chord over the shared 10 by 13 chord domain
spatialAnalysis.coarseToFineRule: bilinear interpolation of c16 scalar fields onto c20 cell-center coordinates; nearest-neighbor interpolation for owner masks
spatialAnalysis.comparisonMask: cells fluid at both resolutions after a one-c20-cell dilation of either owner mask
primaryMetrics: fraction of squared field residual within 0.5 chord of either wing
spatialAnalysis.phaseAggregation: report every captured phase and an equal-weight aggregate across all ten phases

mechanismClassification.nearBoundary: at least 60 percent of aggregate squared field residual lies within 0.5 chord of either wing
mechanismClassification.wakeTransport: at most 40 percent lies within 0.5 chord of either wing

decisionRule.scope: diagnostic classification only; this replay cannot authorize a quantitative formation-saving claim
decisionRule.nextRunIfNearBoundary: instrument moving-wall interpolation and realized reflected populations near follower phase 0.055
decisionRule.nextRunIfWakeTransport: measure downstream wake-core position and dissipation at the same phases
decisionRule.nextRunIfMixed: retain both mechanisms and use the phase-resolved residual atlas to select one local probe of each
decisionRule.stopRule: do not launch a c24 ladder or the stopped c20 minimum selector from this diagnostic
